auth.label: API Key
auth.description: MoonClerk API key used in the Authorization header as `Token token=[API Key]`. Generate and view it in MoonClerk settings: https://app.moonclerk.com/settings/api-key.

actions.name: get_customer
actions.description: Retrieve one MoonClerk customer by its numeric ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one MoonClerk customer.

account_balance.description: The amount in cents as returned by MoonClerk.

type.description: The payment method type, such as card.

last4.description: The last four digits of the payment method.

anyOf.description: The payment method details returned by MoonClerk.
The custom ID supplied through MoonClerk integrations.
The related Stripe customer reference.
The amount in cents as returned by MoonClerk when a value exists.
The coupon currency.
The coupon percent discount when present.
The number of months the coupon is active.
The coupon redemption limit when present.
The coupon redemption deadline in UTC.

coupon.description: The coupon details returned by MoonClerk.

anyOf.description: The discount start timestamp in UTC.
The discount end timestamp in UTC.
The discount details returned by MoonClerk.

delinquent.description: Whether the customer is currently delinquent.

anyOf.description: The MoonClerk management URL for the customer.
A string custom field response.
The address response stored in a MoonClerk custom field.
A nullable string custom field response.
The address response stored in a MoonClerk custom field.
An unmodeled custom field response.

custom_fields.description: The custom fields returned for the customer.

anyOf.description: The associated MoonClerk form ID.
The amount in cents as returned by MoonClerk when a value exists.
The amount in cents as returned by MoonClerk when a value exists.
The coupon code applied during checkout.
The checkout timestamp in UTC.
The amount in cents as returned by MoonClerk when a value exists.
The amount in cents as returned by MoonClerk when a value exists.
The MoonClerk checkout token.
The amount in cents as returned by MoonClerk when a value exists.
The checkout trial period in days.
The amount in cents as returned by MoonClerk when a value exists.
The checkout details returned by MoonClerk.
The MoonClerk subscription identifier.
The related Stripe subscription reference.
The subscription status.
The subscription start timestamp in UTC.
The first payment attempt timestamp in UTC.
The next payment attempt timestamp in UTC.
The current billing period start in UTC.
The current billing period end in UTC.
The trial start timestamp in UTC.
The trial end timestamp in UTC.
The subscription trial period in days.
The subscription expiry timestamp in UTC.
The subscription cancellation timestamp in UTC.
The subscription end timestamp in UTC.
The MoonClerk plan identifier.
The related Stripe plan reference.
The amount in cents as returned by MoonClerk when a value exists.
The plan amount description.
The plan currency.
The billing interval.
The billing interval count.
The subscription plan details returned by MoonClerk.
The subscription details returned by MoonClerk.

actions.name: get_form
actions.description: Retrieve one MoonClerk payment form by its numeric ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one MoonClerk form.

access_token.description: The public access token for the form.

payment_volume.description: The amount in cents as returned by MoonClerk.

successful_checkout_count.description: The number of successful checkouts for the form.

created_at.description: The form creation timestamp in UTC.

updated_at.description: The form last update timestamp in UTC.

actions.name: list_customers
actions.description: List MoonClerk customers with official filters for form, checkout date, next payment date, and status.

count.description: The number of rows to return. MoonClerk accepts values from 1 to 100.

offset.description: The starting offset for pagination in the current result set.

checkout_from.description: The date in YYYY-MM-DD format required by MoonClerk.

checkout_to.description: The date in YYYY-MM-DD format required by MoonClerk.

next_payment_from.description: The date in YYYY-MM-DD format required by MoonClerk.

next_payment_to.description: The date in YYYY-MM-DD format required by MoonClerk.

status.description: The MoonClerk customer subscription status filter.

actions.name: list_forms
actions.description: List MoonClerk payment forms with official pagination parameters.

count.description: The number of rows to return. MoonClerk accepts values from 1 to 100.

created_at.description: The form creation timestamp in UTC.

updated_at.description: The form last update timestamp in UTC.
